Definition: Date when the product was actually delivered to the customer.
PQL Logic: "Delivery_Dim"."Delivery_Date"
Purpose / Meaning: Used to measure delays and calculate on-time delivery and OTIF.

Definition: Average delay duration converted from milliseconds to days.
PQL Logic: "_ARIS.Case"."Avg delay duration"/86400000
Purpose / Meaning: Converts stored delay time into days for easier analysis.

Definition: Time difference between requested delivery date and actual delivery date when delivery is late.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN TIME_BETWEEN("_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date","_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date") END
Purpose / Meaning: Measures how late deliveries occur.

Definition: Predicts whether an order is likely to fail OTIF. 0.4 is suggested by the client.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Risk ratio") > 0.4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 indicates high risk of failing OTIF.

Definition: Categorizes delay duration into ranges.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration ">0) AND ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration "<=10) THEN 'A.1-10' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration ">=11) AND ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration "<=20) THEN 'B.11-20' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration ">=21) AND ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration "<=30) THEN 'C.21-30' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration ">=31) AND ("_ARIS.Case"." Avg Days Delay Duration "<=40) THEN 'D.31-40' ELSE 'Delay More than 40 Days' END
Purpose / Meaning: Helps analyze delay severity.

Definition: Identifies orders delayed and not fully delivered.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales_Order_DIM"."Delivered Quantity" < "Sales_Order_DIM"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Flags orders that are both late and incomplete.

Definition: Unique identifier for each delivery.
PQL Logic: "Delivery_Dim"."Delivery Number"
Purpose / Meaning: Used as a primary key to identify individual deliveries.

Definition: Source city of shipment.
PQL Logic: "Delivery_Dim"."Source City"
Purpose / Meaning: Identifies the origin location of a shipment.

Definition: Checks whether delivered quantity meets ordered quantity.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Sales_Order_DIM"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales_Order_DIM"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means order was delivered in full.

Definition: Checks whether delivery occurred before or on requested date.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means order was delivered on time.

Definition: Percentage of orders delivered on time.
PQL Logic: QUERY(SUM("_ARIS.Case"."On- time") / CT("Sales_Order_DIM"."Sales Order Number"))
Purpose / Meaning: Gives an overall on-time delivery rate.

Definition: Orders not yet fully delivered or partially delivered.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Delivery_Dim"."Delivery_Status"!='Delivered') OR ("Sales_Order_DIM"."Delivered Quantity" < "Sales_Order_DIM"."Order Quantity") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Tracks orders still pending completion.

Definition: Orders likely to be delayed due to issues (e.g. Carrier, traffic, weather).
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Delivery_Dim"."Delivery_Status")!= 'Delivered' AND "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned"."Delay Reason for Delivery" != NULL_TEXT THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Flags undelivered orders with a known delay reason.

Definition: Orders delivered On-Time and In-Full.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales_Order_DIM"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales_Order_DIM"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Core KPI: 1 means order met both On-Time and In-Full criteria.

Definition: Predicted OTIF success probability.
PQL Logic: "_ARIS.Case"."On-time probability" * "_ARIS.Case"."In-full probability"
Purpose / Meaning: Combines on-time and in-full probability to forecast OTIF.

Definition: Delivery date requested by the customer.
PQL Logic: TO_DATE("Sales_Order_DIM"."Requested_Delivery_Date")
Purpose / Meaning: Baseline date used to measure on-time delivery.

Definition: Combined risk indicator.
PQL Logic: ("_ARIS.Case"."Delay Risk" + "_ARIS.Case"."Stock shortage in warehouse" + "_ARIS.Case"."Transport Delay") / 3
Purpose / Meaning: Average of three risk signals; used in Check Predictive OTIF.

Definition: Indicates shipment affected by disruption.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet"."Shipment Affected"=1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means the shipment was impacted by a disruption.

Definition: Detects insufficient warehouse inventory.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Warehouse_DIM"."QUANTITY" < "Sales_Order_DIM"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means warehouse stock is less than what was ordered.

Definition: Delay caused by route disruptions.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned"."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means delivery was impacted by a route disruption.

Definition: Operational issues occurring in warehouse (labour shortage, inventory mismatch, system downtime).
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet"."Warehouse Issue"!='None') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means a warehouse issue was reported for that order.
